componentInstanceProperties.value: Warning! Servicing Country is on the sanctioned list.

componentInstanceProperties.name: richTextValue
componentInstanceProperties.value: Warning! Review BM Entities values. You can dismiss this message by clicking on the Dismiss Entity Warning button on the top of the page.
